content.en:
Ye Tian didn't want to give up this opportunity, once he left here, he would definitely be fully targeted by the Demon Sound Sect, and if he didn't want the human race to be implicated at that time, then he had to expose the Star Crystal and attract other forces to deal with the Demon Sound Sect.

Moreover, he can also obtain the full support of the Void Heaven Temple, so as to protect the Terrans, otherwise he would not be able to protect the Terrans alone.

But at that time, it will be difficult for him to obtain the Star Crystal, so many forces are united, and there are not many Star Crystals shared on the head of each force!

And the Star Crystals allocated to him may only be a few, or even less!

Therefore, he must obtain a large number of Star Crystals at one time, even if it costs him, he is willing!

Ye Tian tried his best to resist, and the people of the Demon Yin Sect attacked desperately.

In order to be able to kill Ye Tian, the Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Yin Sect all came one after another, and even the Divine Generals and Earth Venerables were sent, even if the Divine Generals and Earth Venerables couldn't exert much of an attack, but the Demon Yin Sect didn't care, and it was okay to be able to increase a trace of attack.

With such a large-scale mobilization of manpower by the Demon Yin Sect, almost the entire headquarters of the powerhouses went to the Ten Star Sea, and this move naturally couldn't hide from the people of other big forces.

All of a sudden, people from other forces also rushed to the Ten Star Sea one after another.

Soon, they knew that the powerhouse of the Demon Sound Sect had launched an attack in the Ten Star Sea, but no one knew what the specific situation was.

Judging from the battle situation, it was the powerhouses of the Demon Sound Sect who were attacking someone.

But that's weird!

It stands to reason that even if a mere Ten Star Sea is worth a lot, it is not easy to collect Xingchen Sand, even if someone comes to steal Xingchen Sand, it will not be that everyone in the entire force will come here to protect it.

If the Demon Yin Sect does this, isn't it afraid that the treasures in other places will be taken away by other forces?

Many forces suddenly felt that the Demon Yin Sect was strange, and something big must have happened in the Ten Star Sea, and it was not an ordinary big thing, it was a big thing worthy of the entire Demon Yin Sect's efforts.

Ten stars overseas.

A powerful Heavenly Monarch arrived, and they were basically the top 100 Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Army List, and there was even no shortage of half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses.

One by one, they tried to penetrate their Divine Senses into the Ten Star Sea, but the Demon Yin Sect had already prepared and blocked this area, and even the Heavenly Monarch Divine Sense could not penetrate it, and they could only faintly sense the continuous outbreak of battle in the Ten Star Sea.

"Baili Zhenjun, what are you Demon Sound Sect doing, what kind of conspiracy are you doing?"

A half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouse questioned the Hundred Miles Heavenly Monarch.

Bai Li Zhenjun responded while attacking: "Hmph, there are thieves who have broken into the Ten Star Sea, and even killed many of our Heavenly Monarchs, our Demon Sound Sect must kill them!"

"Oh, to be able to make the entire Demon Sound Sect dispatch, the enemy is definitely not weak, who is it that is worthy of such a big move by the Demon Sound Sect?" A group of Heavenly Monarchs and half-step true spirits were all curious.

"No comment!"

Baili Zhenjun responded coldly.

He didn't dare to say that the enemy was a Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, because there was a Heavenly Monarch or even a half-step true spirit of the Void Heaven One Vein outside, if he said it, the Void Heaven One Vein would definitely kill him.

In that case, they would have no choice but to do anything about the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Zi Ye Tian, and the secret here would be completely revealed.

As long as Ye Tian is dead, they will repair the formation of the secret land, and they will not be afraid of the exposure of the star crystal.

......

"The injuries are getting worse!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Under such circumstances, no matter how much he can save his life, it will be difficult for him to persevere.

Immediately, he shattered the countless healing treasures in the universe in his body, and one after another introduced healing energy into his body to help him repair his body.

That way, he will be able to hold on for at least a lot longer.

Of course, this approach is too wasteful of resources and comes at a high cost.

But as long as you collect enough Star Crystals, it's worth the cost.

Time passed day by day, and finally Ye Tian harvested 20 star crystals again.

Ye Tian looked at the remaining large number of star crystals, and suddenly showed a look of greed and desire, but then his eyes were firm, and he gritted his teeth and gave up.

"I have to go, or I'm afraid I'm going to fall here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"The Great Realm Moves, Go!"

Ye Tian burst out with all his strength, blasting out a wisp of spatial fluctuations, and immediately under the chaos magic power of the Great Realm Shift, Ye Tian shuttled away.

The formation and ban of the Demon Sound Sect can ban the general spatial chaos supernatural power, and even the space-time transfer technique, but it cannot ban the movement of the Great Realm.

The Great Realm Shift, known as the strongest escape supernatural power, is it a waste of fame?

As long as Ye Tian can't be killed, there is no way to stop Ye Tian from leaving.

When Ye Tian used the Great Realm to move and escape, Baili Zhenjun went crazy, roaring and roaring, shaking the endless void.

"The Great Realm Shifts, how can he move the Great Realm????"

Baili Zhenjun couldn't believe it.

Knowing that Ye Tian could escape, they would definitely pay a heavy price and completely seal Ye Tian.

It's just that they were afraid of Ye Tian's eternity and didn't extinguish the fire before, and they were worried that a large number of Heavenly Monarchs would fall, so they chose to consume Ye Tian.

But in fact, they paid a heavy price and were sure to seal Ye Tian.

However, one wrong step is the wrong one.

Ye Tian escaped, and they had no way to pursue him!

......

The universe, some small world.

Ye Tian appeared here and immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

He didn't care about the injuries on his body, and hurriedly returned to the Void Heaven Temple, and then summoned other Heavenly Monarchs in the name of Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, and even summoned the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, who was the third on the Heavenly Monarch List.

Soon after, these Heavenly Monarchs rushed back one after another, and even the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch sent an incarnation to come, and as for the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch's deity, he guarded the treasure land of the Ancient Sea Realm.

"Wanfa Daozi, what are you doing when you summoned us?"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch was a little unhappy.

After all, he guarded the Ancient Sea Realm and had been in retreat and cultivation, for a Heavenly Monarch like him, the most important thing at the moment was to add a trace of foundation, and then impact the half-step True Spirit and True Spirit Realm.

If you don't have a big deal, you don't want to worry about trivial things at all.

But Ye Tian is the Taoist of the Void Heaven lineage, and he doesn't want to be offended, so he came.

But if Ye Tian had nothing to do and summoned indiscriminately, he wouldn't have a good tone.

Seeing that the Heavenly Monarchs were almost there, Ye Tian spoke: "I'm talking about a big thing about the Ten Star Sea of the Demon Sound Sect!"

"Ten Star Sea, Ten Thousand Law Daozi, do you know what happened to the Ten Star Sea?" Peng Yu Tianjun asked curiously.

He was just outside the Ten Stars and was very curious about the situation in the Ten Star Sea, but he didn't dare to rashly start a war with the Demon Sound Sect, so he didn't break into the Demon Sound Sea.

"Of course I know, not long ago, I was besieged by a large number of Heavenly Monarchs and half-step True Spirit powerhouses of the Demon Sound Sect in the Ten Star Sea, and I was besieged for a month. If it weren't for my strong means of saving my life, I'm afraid I would have fallen!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Wanfa Daozi, are you asking us to avenge you? This is a big deal, the power of the Demon Sound Sect in the Great Universe is not weaker than ours, and even a little stronger than us. Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch frowned.

"Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, aren't you curious why I was besieged by the people of the Demon Sound Sect, even at the expense of the entire sect forces?" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"What is the reason?"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch was also curious.

He was not stupid, he was just disturbed by emotions before, but now that he thinks about it carefully, Ye Tian is a master of ten thousand laws, even if he breaks into the Ten Star Sea, the Demon Yin Sect will not dare to rashly besiege Ye Tian.

It's not like you have to kill a Daozi for a little Xingchensha!

The other Heavenly Monarchs were also curious, waiting for Ye Tian's answer.

"What if I say that the value of Ten Star Sea is far more than 10 million points, but countless billions of points?"

Ye Tianlang said.
